The '''''Monitor III''''' was a [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class cruiser]] dispatched in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] to destroy the [[Iridium Pirates/Legends|Pirates of Iridium]].

==History==
Along with [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]] and several other [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]], ''Monitor III'' made the rendezvous with the [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] before they turned and opened fire. During the course of the battle, the [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] sustained heavy damage, only escaping destruction via the cover fire of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi's]] six [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 starfighters]].

Her shields penetrated by the pirates' notorious [[power gem]], the Jedi [[Dovish Hokken]], [[Yrada Soludisan]], and four [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Judicial/Legends|Judiciaries]] on board were killed.

==Appearances==
